title: Droidworks (disambiguation)
content:
{{Youmay|disambiguating "droidworks"|[[droid worker]]s, modified [[battle droid]]s in service to the [[Geonosian]] [[queen]] [[Karina]]}}
'''Droidworks''' or '''DroidWorks''' may refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[TransTech Droidworks]]''', the manufacturer of the [[S-series survey droid]] and the [[SR-series scout/observation droid]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Farrfin Droidworks]]''', the manufacturer of the [[Aggressor-series battle droid]] with which they hoped to counter the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].
*'''[[Imperial DroidWorks]]''', the manufacturer of the [[Seneschal-series factotum droid]].
*'''[[Rossum Droidworks]]''', a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer and trader owned by [[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]] that worked on the [[Iron Eclipse]] project.
*[[TransTech Droidworks/Legends|'''TransTech Droidworks''']], a [[Trade Federation of Planets|Trade Federation]] corporation that produced [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] on [[Loken III]].

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*'''''[[Star Wars: DroidWorks]]''''', a [[1998]] [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] game released by [[Lucas Learning]].
*'''[[Droidworks Assault]]''', a three-part set of scenarios published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] for the ''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]'' game.

{{Disambig}}
